Both instruments visible, approaching the drain to begin suture placement

frame_analyses.description: Suture being passed through first mark on the drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Accurate placement through first mark with minimal deviation

frame_analyses.description: Continuing suture passage, working toward second mark
Beginning knot tying sequence, creating first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initiating surgeon's knot formation with double throw
Proper surgeon's knot technique with double wrap

frame_analyses.description: Creating second throw after hand switching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear hand switch observed, single throw formation

frame_analyses.description: Executing final third throw with opposite hand
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Another hand switch performed, completing knot sequence

frame_analyses.description: Positioning scissors to cut suture ends
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper scissor positioning for clean cutting

frame_analyses.description: Cutting both suture ends inside the trainer
Task completed, final view of secured knot on drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears secure, drain slit well-approximated

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed well
Clean single throw with proper hand switching
Final throw with hand switch, knot appears well-secured

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Excellent slit approximation with no visible gap, drain remains securely attached

technique_summary: Excellent performance with proper surgeon's knot formation, correct hand switching sequence, and precise suture placement. Task completed efficiently with good knot security.
improvement_suggestions: Could potentially reduce time in suture placement phase
Maintain consistent tempo throughout all throws
